name: Critical LCR breach — regulatory minimum violated
description: LCR dropped to 94% (below 100% regulatory minimum). HQLA depleted by $3.2M outflow. NSFR still above 100% at 104%. Should produce CRITICAL alert on liquidity with regulatory ref to COSSEC Reg. 8866 and 30-day deadline. Tests that agent correctly escalates regulatory breaches vs policy breaches.
